title: Know the Land
description:
This move may be taken multiple times. Each time you take this move, choose 1 region in which you have spent at least a week traveling. This region is considered familiar to you.

When you **Spout Lore** about a familiar region, roll +WIS instead of +INT.

title: Read the Land (+WIS)
description: When you **survey the territory ahead from a good vantage point**, roll +WIS:

outcomes.text: The GM must answer all 3 questions below:
bullets: Where ahead will I find refuge?

outcomes.text: Ask the GM 2 questions from the list above.

submoves.title: Note
submoves.description: In any case, take **+1 forward** to the next time you act on one of the answers.

title: Be the Land (+DEX)
description: When you **conceal yourself in a familiar region**, say how you do it and roll +DEX:

outcomes.text: You become nigh invisible, and difficult to locate even with senses other than sight, as long as you do not attract attention to yourself.
The 10+ result applies, but you must remain still to go unnoticed.
Mark XP, and the GM makes a move.

title: Sense Danger (+WIS)
description: When you **are subject to an imminent but unseen threat**, the GM must tell you. Then, roll +WIS:

outcomes.text: The GM tells you where it's coming from, **and** you have time to act before the threat manifests.
The GM tells you where it's coming from, **or** you have time to act before it manifests (choose one).
Mark XP, and the GM makes a move.
